segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Did you go to the rock concert in the park yesterday afternoon? I went to a gardening workshop at the University Center instead. It's sad that I missed out on the concert, but I'm starting my own garden and I need to know all the ins and outs of growing herbs and vegetables. Nice. And to be honest, you didn't miss that much. No? Well, I love some of the songs they played, but the acoustics in the park aren't very good, so the sound quality was rather mediocre and didn't do justice to the songs.
